recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-3854 (CVSS 8.7) lets authenticated users with push access achieve remote code execution on GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise Server via a crafted git push command.
A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-39808, a critical command injection vulnerability in Fortinet FortiSandbox, has been released.
Fortinet disclosed two critical vulnerabilities (CVSS 9.1) in FortiSandbox, enabling unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands and bypass authentication. Patches are available.
